data.title: BNB Chain launches exclusive incentive program for RWA projects
data.description: According to official news, BNB Chain announced the launch of an exclusive incentive program for RWA projects. This exclusive incentive provides tailored support for RWA projects that build or migrate to BNB Chain. Comprehensive support includes but is not limited to: technical and compliance guidance, liquidity seeds and TVL incentives, growth-focused financing and marketing, and customized scalable roadmaps. The program will be open for application from May 29, 2025. All RWA projects with the potential to be supported can join. Finally, BNB Chain will conduct rigorous evaluations and provide incentive support to high-quality RWA projects.

data.title: India and U.S. Trade Talks Progressing Smoothly, Says Official
data.description: According to PANews, India's Special Secretary of the Trade Department, Agarwal, announced on May 29 that trade negotiations between India and the United States are progressing well. He expressed optimism that positive outcomes are expected to be achieved soon.

data.title: India Expands Digital Rupee Pilot with New Features
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has announced plans to expand the scope of its digital rupee (CBDC) pilot in its 2024-25 annual report. The expansion will introduce new features such as programmability and offline payments for both retail and wholesale versions.

These enhancements aim to improve the applicability of the digital rupee in areas with limited network connectivity and tailor payment solutions for specific scenarios like government subsidies or corporate spending controls. Currently, the retail pilot involves 17 banks and 600,000 users, with the RBI allowing certain non-bank entities to offer CBDC wallets to further increase adoption. The wholesale pilot has also seen increased participation, with four additional primary dealers joining.

During the same period, India's digital payment transactions grew by 34.8% in volume and 17.9% in value. The Unified Payments Interface (UPI) has positioned India as a leader in the global real-time payments sector, handling 48.5% of the world's real-time payment transactions. The RBI has also introduced innovative features like 'delegated payments' to broaden the reach of digital payments across various social strata.

data.description:
Bergen County, New Jersey’s most populous region, has signed a landmark five-year agreement with blockchain land records firm Balcony to tokenize 370,000 property deeds on the Avalanche blockchain.

data.title: Sol Strategies Files $1 Billion Prospectus Amid DeFi Dev Corp.'s Liquid Staking Adoption
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Sol Strategies, a Canadian investment firm focused on Solana, has filed a preliminary base shelf prospectus for up to $1 billion. This move, announced on May 27, allows the firm to offer common shares but does not indicate an immediate offering. Leah Wald, CEO of Sol Strategies, stated that this filing aligns with the company's long-term growth strategy, providing flexibility to access capital as opportunities arise within the evolving Solana ecosystem. This strategic step underscores Sol Strategies' commitment to expanding its presence and influence in the Solana market.

In a related development, DeFi Development Corp., a Solana treasury firm, announced on May 28 its decision to adopt Solana liquid staking tokens, specifically dfdvSOL, for its treasury operations. This adoption follows the firm's acquisition of 88,164 SOL in late April, valued at $11.5 million at the time, contributing to its total holdings of $34.4 million in Solana. Liquid staking allows tokenholders to earn rewards without locking up their assets, offering a liquid token that can be traded or used in decentralized finance applications. Parker White, the firm's chief investment officer and chief operating officer, emphasized that this adoption enhances validator operations and treasury management, aligning with the mission to maximize SOL Per Share growth.

Additionally, Sol Strategies announced on May 28 the completion of several key audits and certifications, including SOC 2 Type 1, SOC 1 Type 1, and ISO 27001 certification for its Solana staking platform. These certifications are crucial for ensuring the security, availability, and integrity of the company's operations. SOC 2 Type 1 assesses controls related to security and privacy, while SOC 1 Type 1 focuses on internal controls over financial reporting. ISO 27001 is an international standard for information security management systems. Leah Wald highlighted that these measures are designed to build institutional trust, demonstrating that clients can rely on Sol Strategies for their Solana staking needs. This compliance effort is part of the firm's strategy to establish itself as a major Solana validator, following its previous issuance of $500 million in convertible notes to buy and stake SOL.

data.title: IMF Approves Loan for El Salvador Amid Economic Reforms
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the International Monetary Fund (IMF) has approved El Salvador's eligibility to continue receiving loans, acknowledging the country's strong performance in implementing its economic reform program.

Despite El Salvador's ongoing Bitcoin purchases, the IMF will proceed with the disbursement of the next $120 million loan. Luis Cubeddu, Deputy Director of the IMF's Western Hemisphere Department, and Ivan Torres, Head of the El Salvador Mission, stated that most of the targets set for the first review were easily achieved, and the implementation of structural benchmarks is progressing well.

data.title: Arkham claims to have discovered a Strategy-related wallet involving 70,816 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Blockchain analysis platform Arkham Intelligence released a report saying that it has identified multiple previously undisclosed Bitcoin wallet addresses associated with Bitcoin investment company Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), involving 70,816 BTC (about US$7.6 billion). If true, these addresses account for 87.5% of the company's publicly disclosed holdings, bringing its total holdings to US$54.5 billion. Strategy Executive Chairman Michael Saylor has publicly stated that disclosing enterprise-level Bitcoin wallet addresses will bring long-term security risks. It is worth noting that Arkham has previously been questioned for mislabeling the internal wallet of the Mantra project. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Gate Launchpool, Contract Trading Activities, Financial Management, Alpha, HODLer has launched Sophon (SOPH)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate Launchpool, contract trading activities, financial management, Alpha, and HODLer have all been launched on Sophon (SOPH).
Gate launched the first global Sophon (SOPH) spot trading at 21:00 (UTC+8) on May 28, and simultaneously opened the SOPH perpetual contract real-time trading (USDT settlement), supporting 1-20 times leverage. In addition, a series of ecological activities are in full swing, as follows:
Gate Launchpool: Users can participate in Launchpool activities by staking GT, BTC, and SOPH, and share a 24,000,000 SOPH token prize pool for free, with a total value of approximately US$1.68 million. The event ends at 20:00 (UTC+8) on June 8.
Contract trading activity: The first participation in SOPH/USDT contract trading will receive up to 200 SOPH airdrops, and participation in the full-staff trading challenge will share 800,000 SOPH airdrops.
Gate Yubibao: SOPH current financial products have been launched, with an expected annualized return of up to 499%.
Gate Alpha: SOPH limited-time airdrop activity has been launched. During the activity, the first transaction (regardless of currency) or any SOPH transaction completed on Gate Alpha will receive airdrop rewards and Gate Alpha points rewards, with a total prize pool of 500,000 SOPH. The end time is 00:00 on June 1 (UTC+8).
Previously, Gate also held a HODLer Airdrop event, sharing a total of 1,500,000 SOPH tokens, worth more than 100,000 US dollars.

data.title: Arkham Intelligence Identifies Unreported Bitcoin Wallets Linked to Strategy
data.description: According to Odaily, blockchain analysis platform Arkham Intelligence has released a report identifying several previously undisclosed Bitcoin wallet addresses associated with the investment company Strategy, formerly known as MicroStrategy. These wallets reportedly contain 70,816 BTC, valued at approximately $7.6 billion. If verified, these addresses represent 87.5% of the company's publicly disclosed holdings, bringing its total Bitcoin assets to $54.5 billion. Strategy's Executive Chairman Michael Saylor has previously stated that revealing corporate Bitcoin wallet addresses poses long-term security risks. It is noteworthy that Arkham has faced scrutiny in the past for incorrectly labeling internal wallets of the Mantra project.

data.title: Glassnode: Bitcoin options open interest hits record high of $46.2 billion, market participants become increasingly mature
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Glassnode published an article stating that BTC options open interest recently hit a record high of $46.2 billion, up $25.8 billion from the low point. This growth rate exceeds that of the futures market, indicating that as market participants become more mature, the demand for more advanced hedging and strategy execution is also growing.

data.title: OKX Smart Arbitrage Function Now Supports Stacking Staking Income
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, OKX smart arbitrage has completed a major upgrade. Users can stack SOL and ETH staking rewards while opening smart arbitrage strategies. In addition, OKX has also launched limited-time interest rate coupons for SOL and ETH, allowing users to achieve arbitrage, staking rewards, and interest rate coupons. Annualized returns will be further improved by increasing capital utilization and annualized returns.
It is reported that the smart arbitrage strategy is a method designed to obtain stable returns by hedging market price fluctuations. Its core principle is to use the Delta neutral strategy to hedge the risk of price changes by holding positions of the same size and opposite directions in the spot market and the contract market.

data.title: Backpack launches "Seasonal Extra: Welfare Month" and launches the first trading event
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Backpack's first season points competition hit a double peak in trading volume and user growth. During the short break of the points system, Backpack launched the "Season Extra: Welfare Month" event. The event was officially launched this week. It no longer continues the rhythm of the original points competition, but adopts the form of multiple reward drops. The event will gradually reveal the content around several chapters to guide users to continue to explore and participate.
At present, the official has released the first activity module "Daily Trading Competition". This gameplay is a daily refresh challenge task. There is no need to register. Users who participate in trading volume and profit activities can automatically participate in the prize pool distribution. The daily prize pool is 50,000-100,000 US dollars. Among them, the top 1,000 users in trading volume and the top 500 users in profit will receive 50% of the prize pool incentives, and the remaining users will be allocated another 50% of the prize pool in proportion to their trading volume and profit and loss.
Official reminder, users must turn on the Auto-Lend function to be eligible for rewards, and the spot will be doubled in the trading volume calculation.

data.title: Bitcoin Options Open Interest Reaches Record High
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Glassnode recently reported on social media that Bitcoin options open interest has reached a historic high of $46.2 billion. This marks an increase of $25.8 billion from its previous low. The growth in options open interest surpasses that of the futures market, indicating a rising demand for advanced hedging and strategy execution as market participants become more sophisticated.
